The balls are made of polyester microfiber. These beads with a diameter of about 50-60 mm have a very high filtration capacity. The fibrous structure of the bead has the ability to trap dirt as small as 1.5 micrometers, while the previously used sand only traps dirt around 30-40 micrometers in size. In addition, the balls have the property that they can be used almost indefinitely. After the end of the season, just remove the balls from the filter, then wash them in the washing machine and they are ready to serve another season. A pack of 1 kg filter beads successfully replaces up to 35 kg of sand.
